rules.unlimited: Make as many attempts as you want
rules.attemptCost: Each attempt costs a fixed number of

gameRules.tipText: Ever done something truly epic? Nope and you never will. Why? You're stuck in your comfort zone, wrapped up tight like a plastic bag.

shareKeys.tip: 💡 Tip from Mr. Freeman: Have you ever done anything truly out of the ordinary? Never! And you never will — you know why? Because it all lies outside your comfort zone, and you're packed into it tight, like a polypropylene bag.

gameRules.title: Game rules
gameRules.description: Claim the prize pool by cracking a combination of 6 emoji. Be the first to score over 600 points!

rules.attemptCost: Each attempt costs a fixed number of 🔑 keys
rules.prizePool: Every attempt adds crystals to the prize pool, growing the total each time
rules.scoring: After entering a code you get a percentage result, calculated by the system below
rules.firstWins: On equal scores, first place goes to whoever got there first
